reviewNotes: HELD - NOT PUBLISH READY. ok=false. No corroborated evidence of an English-taught program or an international/Indian-student admissions pathway was found anywhere (official site content could not be fully retrieved due to TLS errors; secondary sources - Vietnamese Wikipedia, VNUR, studyinvietnam.edu.vn aggregator - all describe only Vietnamese-medium domestic Cu nhan (Bachelor) programs in Nursing/Midwifery/Nutrition). Only confirmed international-student activity is a 2019 Lao (Oudomxay Province) government-cooperation cohort, not a general international admissions track. Per the no-fabrication rule, structuredFacts.programs is left empty rather than inventing a courseSlug/medium/officialProgramUrl for an India-facing bsc-nursing entry that cannot be corroborated. See the companion .md file for full research notes, access-issue log, and sources.

sources.label: Truong Dai hoc Dieu duong Nam Dinh - Wikipedia tieng Viet
sources.notes: Primary structured-facts source: founding lineage (1960 predecessor school; upgraded to university status 26 Feb 2004 by PM Decision 24/2004/QD-TTg); address 257 Han Thuyen, Nam Dinh ward, Ninh Binh province (post-2025 provincial merger); public university under Ministry of Health; current rector; undergraduate programs (Nursing 7720301, Midwifery 7720302, Nutrition 7720401); postgraduate programs; faculties list.

sources.label: VNUR.VN (Vietnam University Ranking) - Truong Dai hoc Dieu duong Nam Dinh profile
sources.notes: Corroborates founding year 2004, public ('Cong lap') institution type, official website URL, admission code YDD, address.

sources.label: Nam Dinh University of Nursing - newer official site mirror (nav/homepage)
sources.notes: Confirms faculty list including Khoa Dieu duong - Ho sinh (Nursing-Midwifery Faculty) and site navigation structure (Tuyen sinh Dai hoc / undergraduate admissions, Hop tac quoc te / international cooperation). Inner content pages (admissions, international cooperation) returned only shared template boilerplate with no route-specific body text when fetched, so could not be used to confirm any English-medium or international-admissions program details.

sources.label: studyinvietnam.edu.vn - Nam Dinh University of Nursing detail page (via search index)
sources.notes: Secondary/lower-confidence source (direct fetch timed out repeatedly; content accessed only via search-engine index summary). States NDUN training scale (~2000 full-time students in Nursing/Midwifery/Public Health/Nutrition plus bridging programs), staffing (306 staff, 194 faculty, 73 visiting lecturers), and a claim that the university was 'upgraded' again in 2014 as the first public nursing university in Vietnam. Not used as authoritative establishedYear since the Wikipedia/VNUR government-decision-cited 2004 date is treated as more primary.

sources.label: Herald Open Access Journal - Training Master's in Nursing Program of Nam Dinh University of Nursing and University of Medicine and Pharmacy, Ho Chi Minh City
sources.notes: Confirms existence of a joint Master's in Nursing program with University of Medicine and Pharmacy, Ho Chi Minh City (2017-2018 cohort study). Postgraduate-only; no undergraduate/international-admissions information.
